VAL-DATA-001.details: curl fetch returned HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json (16599 bytes). JSON parsed successfully with python3 json.load(). Top-level keys: product_name, timestamp, executive_summary, today_judgments, trend_directions, product_lines, fourteen_day_changes, evidence_entries, scoring_model, keyword_groups.

VAL-DATA-002.details: 4 trend directions found (minimum 4 required). All have complete fields: name (Chinese), heat_magnitude (+32%, +24%, +18%, +12%), confidence_level (高, 中, 中高, 中), time_window, judgment_state (值得跟, 观察中, 需要补证据, 短热噪音), audience_fit, and price_band_fit. VAL-DATA-003.details: All 4 required product lines present: 项链/吊坠 (opportunity=高, risk=低中, movement=上升), 耳饰 (opportunity=中高, risk=中, movement=高潜但不稳定), 戒指 (opportunity=中, risk=中高, movement=证据不足), 手串/叠戴 (opportunity=中, risk=中, movement=当前人群更稳). VAL-DATA-004.details: 7 evidence entries found (minimum 6 required). All have required fields: type (笔记×3, 图片×2, 评论×2 — all valid types), related_direction, source, timestamp AND freshness indicator, and relevance_explanation.

VAL-DATA-005.details: 14-day change data present with all three categories: rising/升温 (2 entries: 18K 金镶翡翠 +8%, 多巴胺色系耳饰 +12%), cooling/降温 (1 entry: 传统素金镯 -15%), newly_emerging/新出现 (1 entry: 冰感小件吊坠 +12%). Each entry has direction name, change percentage, and reason.

VAL-DATA-006.details: All 4 directions have freshness indicators (最近30天, 最近14天, 最近60天, 最近7天). All 7 evidence entries have freshness indicators (最近7天, 最近3天, 最近30天, 最近14天). No missing freshness metadata.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. JSON data file is valid, fetchable (HTTP 200), contains 4 trend directions with complete fields, all 4 product lines with required data, 7 evidence entries (≥6 required) with all required fields, 14-day change data with rising/cooling/emerging categories, and freshness metadata on all directions and evidence items.
